comment: Hashes are FNV-1a 32-bit over the exact module Source bytes. tools/hash_shared.luau computes the same hash inside Studio. 'deployed' records the hash last verified in each Place; null = not yet deployed. Any mismatch between file hash and a deployed hash = DRIFT: stop and reconcile before working on shared systems.

Signal.comment: Lua-side pub/sub used by PlayerDataService. Promoted into shared canon 2026-07-17 (AD-Lobby session) from the verified live Game source; covered by the shared/src deploys row in OWNERSHIP.md (owner AD-Game).
